languages.text: {n}Несколько шумных секунд — и преступница уже стоит на коленях, скрученная руками блюстителей. Красная от ярости Иокаста рычит:{/n} "Я позабочусь о ее наказании, Лорд-капитан, если только вы не предпочтете сделать это сами".

{n}A few seconds of commotion, and the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."
languages.original_text: {n}Несколько шумных секунд — и преступница уже стоит на коленях, скрученная руками блюстителей. Красная от ярости Иокаста рычит:{/n} "Я позабочусь о ее наказании, Лорд-капитан, если только вы не предпочтете сделать это сами".

traits.locale_text: {n}A few seconds of commotion, and the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

{n}A few seconds of commotion, and the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

{n}A few seconds of commotion, and the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

languages.text: {n}数秒の騒ぎの後、犯人は既に膝まずき、武装解除され、執行官に拘束されていた。怒りに燃えるサウアーバックは唸りながら言った、{/n}「彼女の処罰は私が引き受けます、艦長殿。ご自身でなさる方がよろしいならば、どうぞ」
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds of commotion, and the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

traits.locale_text: 数秒の騒ぎの後、犯人は既に膝まずき、武装解除され、執行官に拘束されていた。怒りに燃えるサウアーバックは唸りながら言った、「彼女の処罰は私が引き受けます、艦長殿。ご自身でなさる方がよろしいならば、どうぞ。」

languages.text: {n}Birkaç saniyelik kargaşanın ardından fail dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor, silahsızlandırılıyor ve infazcılarca zapt ediliyor. Öfkeden kıpkırmızı kesilen Sauerback hırlıyor.{/n} "Cezalandırılmasını sağlayacağım Lord Kaptan, tabii kendiniz cezalandırmak isterseniz başka."
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds of commotion, and the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Birkaç saniyelik kargaşanın ardından fail dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor, silahsızlandırılıyor ve infazcılarca zapt ediliyor. Öfkeden kıpkırmızı kesilen Sauerback hırlıyor.{/n} "Cezalandırılmasını sağlayacağım Lord Kaptan, tabii kendiniz cezalandırmak isterseniz başka."

languages.text: {n}Tras unos segundos de conmoción, la criminal está de rodillas, desarmada y sujeta por tus guardias. Roja de rabia, Sauerback gruñe:{/n} «Me encargaré de su castigo, Lord Capitán, a menos que prefiera hacerlo usted mism{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds of commotion, and the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras unos segundos de conmoción, la criminal está de rodillas, desarmada y sujeta por tus guardias. Roja de rabia, Sauerback gruñe:{/n} «Me encargaré de su castigo, Lord Capitán, a menos que prefiera hacerlo usted mism{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: {n}几秒的骚乱过后，行凶者便已跪倒在地，被执法者缴械并制服。苏尔贝克气得满脸通红，咆哮道，{/n}“我会监督惩处，舰长大人，或者您也可以亲自处决她。”
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds of commotion, and the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}几秒的骚乱过后，行凶者便已跪倒在地，被执法者缴械并制服。苏尔贝克气得满脸通红，咆哮道，{/n}“我会监督惩处，舰长大人，或者您也可以亲自处决她。”

languages.text: {n}Après quelques secondes d'agitation, la femme est déjà à genoux, désarmée et maîtrisée par les prévôts. Rouge de colère, Sauerback gronde :{/n} « Je me chargerai de son châtiment, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, à moins que vous ne souhaitiez le faire vous-même. »
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds of commotion, and the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après quelques secondes d'agitation, la femme est déjà à genoux, désarmée et maîtrisée par les prévôts. Rouge de colère, Sauerback gronde :{/n} « Je me chargerai de son châtiment, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, à moins que vous ne souhaitiez le faire vous-même. »

languages.text: {n}Nach einigen chaotischen Sekunden ist die Täterin bereits auf den Knien, entwaffnet und unter Kontrolle der Enforcer. Sauerback knurrt rot vor Wut:{/n} "Ich werde mich um ihre Bestrafung kümmern, Lord Captain, außer Ihr wollt sie selbst durchführen."
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds of commotion, and the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einigen chaotischen Sekunden ist die Täterin bereits auf den Knien, entwaffnet und unter Kontrolle der Enforcer. Sauerback knurrt rot vor Wut:{/n} "Ich werde mich um ihre Bestrafung kümmern, Lord Captain, außer Ihr wollt sie selbst durchführen."
